name: 360 Video Booth
tagline: Spin the Moment, Keep It Forever
metaTitle: 360 Video Booth Rental Nova Scotia | Operator Included | Nova Kingdom Rentals
metaDescription: 360 Video Booth rental for Nova Scotia events. Operator, setup, and takedown included. Standalone from $249 or add-on from $199. Book from Bridgewater.
shortDescription: 360 Video Booth rental for birthdays, schools, festivals, fundraisers, corporate events, weddings, and community celebrations in Nova Scotia. Operator included.
fullDescription:
The 360 Video Booth adds a fun, engaging attraction to any event. Guests step onto the rotating 100 cm platform, strike a pose, and capture slow-motion video from every angle — all backed by the RGB ring light and LED strip lighting.

Operator is included with every booking. Setup and takedown are included. Available as a standalone rental or at a discounted rate when added to any inflatable or event package.

Basic props may be included when available. Custom theme props ($10 per theme) can be arranged in advance — request before your event date. Custom video editing is not included unless quoted separately.
features: Operator included — no extra staffing cost
Add-on with any package: 1 hour $199 — each additional hour $70
Basic props may be included when available
Custom theme props available for $10 per theme — request before your event date
setupNotes: Plug-in power access required (standard household outlet)
Enough space around the booth for guests to move comfortably
Custom video editing not included unless quoted separately
Custom theme props not included unless arranged in advance ($10 per theme — request before event date)
specs: Platform diameter: 100 cm / 39.4 in — heavy-duty metal
Height: up to approx. 163 cm / 64.2 in
Adjustable arm with universal phone and camera mount
Plug-in electric power required (no generator needed)
Standalone: 1 hour $249 — each additional hour $100 — operator included
Add-on with any package: 1 hour $199 — each additional hour $70 — operator included
Custom theme props: $10 per theme (must be requested before event date)
